entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS695) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. UPDATE DMRC CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3549.01S. 2. ADD CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES (CCS) ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3552.01E. 3. ADD CSDES ICB PRICING AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3555.01E. 4. ADD ELEVEN (11) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVIC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3557.01E. 5. ADD CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES (CCS) ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3472.02E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS697) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADD MNS INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3516.01E. 2. ADD MNS INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3544.01E. 3. ADD MANAGED EQUIPMENT SERVICE (MES) CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3527.01E. 4. ADD NINE (9) CISCO SEDS TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3576.01E. 5. ADD A NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), MRC PRICE FOR ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3572.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS698) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS PRICING AND CASE NUMBER PREMISES WIRING AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3564.01E. 2. ADDITION OF CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES ICB PRICING, DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3577.01E. 3. ADDITION OF CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICES ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3580.01E. 4. ADDITION OF ONE (1) PLANTRONICS SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3591.01E. 5. ADDITION OF ONE (1) CISCO SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3592.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS699) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. ADD MNS CLINS AND PRICES, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3543.01E.
2. ADD CASE NUMBERS FOR THE ADDITIONAL SOW CSDES, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3553.01E.
3. ADD MANAGED EQUIPMENT SERVICE (MES) CLIN FOR MNS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3560.01E.
4. ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3546.01E.
5. ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3559.01E
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS700) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF PLATINUM SECONDARY ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3558.01E. 2. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET (30MBPS) ACCESS, DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3561.01E. 3. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC METRO ETHERNET, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3562.01E. 4. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC ETHERNET ACCESS FOR DIFFERENT BANDWIDTHS IN CONUS REGION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3565.01E. 5. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET (3MBPS) - SWC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3567.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS701) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADD ONE (1) INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) FOR THE IOC PHASE OF THE C3MP MODERNIZATION PROGRAM AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3570.01E. 2. ADD TWO (2) INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CASES FOR HARDWARE, SOFTWARE AND IMPLEMENTATION FOR THE C3MP MODERNIZATION PROGRAM AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3588.01E. 3. ADD ETHERNET ACCESS NSC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3507.01E. 4. ADD TWO (2) SINGLEWIRE SEDS TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3547.01E. 5. ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3563.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS703) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES 1. ADDITION OF INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS ETHERNET PRIVATE LINE TRANSPORT (1GB) FOR 2 CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3550.01E. 2. ADDITION OF INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENTS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3575.01E. 3. ADDITION OF CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3579.01E. 4. ADDITION OF CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES, NETWORK APPLICATION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3587.01E. 5. ADDITION OF MWLANS, WIRELESS NETWORK INSTALLATION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3586.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
